questions.q: What is the name of NASA's first crewed mission to the Moon in over half a century, which launched on April 1, 2026, and includes Canadian astronaut Jeremy Hansen?
questions.correctText: Artemis II is the mission that launched on April 1, 2026, as the first crewed lunar flyby in over 50 years, with Canadian Space Agency astronaut Jeremy Hansen aboard.

questions.q: Who was elected as the leader of the New Democratic Party (NDP) on March 29, 2026, vowing to move the party to the left and stop oil industry expansion?
questions.correctText: Avi Lewis was elected leader of the New Democratic Party on March 29, 2026, and is known for advocating for left-wing policies and stopping oil industry expansion.

questions.q: On March 31, 2026, what major change did Canada Post announce it would implement to address financial pressures, converting many addresses to community mailboxes?
questions.correctText: Canada Post announced on March 31, 2026, its plan to move ahead with ending home mail delivery as part of a major restructuring to restore financial stability.

questions.q: Maya Gebala, a survivor of the February 10, 2026, Tumbler Ridge mass shooting, was reported in April 2026 to be out of which critical care unit?
questions.correctText: Maya Gebala, a 12-year-old survivor of the Tumbler Ridge mass shooting on February 10, 2026, was released from intensive care in April 2026.

questions.q: Which Canadian Space Agency astronaut is part of the Artemis II mission, launched on April 1, 2026, marking the first time a Canadian will travel around the Moon?
questions.correctText: Canadian Space Agency astronaut Jeremy Hansen is a mission specialist on the Artemis II flight, which launched on April 1, 2026, and will loop around the Moon.
